positive.stdout:

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for neg.tptp
5. orchestra(vienna_music_society) [input(axiom)]
6. leads(beethoven,vienna_music_society) [input(axiom)]
7. ! [X0,X1] : ((orchestra(X1) & leads(X0,X1)) => conductor(X0)) [input(axiom)]
9. conductor(beethoven) [input(conjecture)]
10. ~conductor(beethoven) [negated conjecture 9]
11. ~conductor(beethoven) [flattening 10]
14. ! [X0,X1] : (conductor(X0) | (~orchestra(X1) | ~leads(X0,X1))) [ennf transformation 7]
15. ! [X0,X1] : (conductor(X0) | ~orchestra(X1) | ~leads(X0,X1)) [flattening 14]
24. orchestra(vienna_music_society) [cnf transformation 5]
25. leads(beethoven,vienna_music_society) [cnf transformation 6]
26. ~leads(X0,X1) | ~orchestra(X1) | conductor(X0) [cnf transformation 15]
28. ~conductor(beethoven) [cnf transformation 11]
29. ~orchestra(vienna_music_society) | conductor(beethoven) [resolution 26,25]
30. conductor(beethoven) [forward subsumption resolution 29,24]
31. $false [forward subsumption resolution 30,28]
% SZS output end Proof for neg.tptp
